global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central focus on a card-related service.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple card signup service.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CoinBridge' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Top decorative area
elements.description: A dark background area at the top of the ad, providing a contrast to the logo.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A central area with a light gray background, featuring abstract shapes that suggest a card and a circle.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Secure & simple' in a large font, centrally positioned within the main content area.

elements.label: Additional message text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that reads 'Fast signup, instant card', providing more context.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A prominent display of the price '€29.99' in a bold font, located near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Secondary content area
elements.description: A gray area with abstract shapes, adding visual interest to the central section of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Install now' in a bold font, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Additional decorative shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes in the background, enhancing the overall design without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Overall background
elements.description: A dark background that provides contrast to the lighter elements in the ad.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup instant card €29.99 Install now

elements.label: CoinBridge headline
elements.description: The text 'CoinBridge' displayed prominently at the top, serving as the brand identifier.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and minimalistic, CoinBridge logo, secure signup message
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by a decorative area, with the main message and additional text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CoinBridge, Secure & simple, Fast signup, instant card, €29.99, Install now
